---
description: 'System table containing information about normal and aggregate functions.'
keywords: ['system table', 'functions']
slug: /operations/system-tables/functions
title: 'system.functions'
doc_type: 'reference'
---

## Description {#description}

Contains information about normal and aggregate functions.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” The name of the function.
- `is_aggregate` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Whether the function is an aggregate function.
- `case_insensitive` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Whether the function name can be used case-insensitively.
- `alias_to` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” The original function name, if the function name is an alias.
- `create_query` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” Obsolete.
- `origin` ([Enum8('System' = 0, 'SQLUserDefined' = 1, 'ExecutableUserDefined' = 2)](/sql-reference/data-types/enum)) вҖ” Obsolete.
- `description` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” A high-level description what the function does.
- `syntax` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” Signature of the function.
- `arguments` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” The function arguments.
- `parameters` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” The function parameters (only for aggregate function).
- `returned_value` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” What does the function return.
- `examples` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” Usage example.
- `introduced_in` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” ClickHouse version in which the function was first introduced.
- `categories` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” The category of the function.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->

## Example {#example}

```sql title="Query"
 SELECT name, is_aggregate, is_deterministic, case_insensitive, alias_to FROM system.functions LIMIT 5;
```

```text title="Response"
в”Ңв”Җnameв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җis_aggregateв”Җв”¬в”Җis_deterministicв”Җв”¬в”Җcase_insensitiveв”Җв”¬в”Җalias_toв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ BLAKE3                   в”Ӯ            0 в”Ӯ                1 в”Ӯ                0 в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ sipHash128Reference      в”Ӯ            0 в”Ӯ                1 в”Ӯ                0 в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ mapExtractKeyLike        в”Ӯ            0 в”Ӯ                1 в”Ӯ                0 в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ sipHash128ReferenceKeyed в”Ӯ            0 в”Ӯ                1 в”Ӯ                0 в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ mapPartialSort           в”Ӯ            0 в”Ӯ                1 в”Ӯ                0 в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
